title: Fragment: A Wanderer.
content:
He wanders, like a day-appearing dream,
    Through the dim wildernesses of the mind;
    Through desert woods and tracts, which seem
    Like ocean, homeless, boundless, unconfined.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Percy Bysshe Shelley delivers a powerful performance in "Fragment: A Wanderer."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
